MATLAB | IT@UMN | The people behind the technology
Skip to main content
Skip to main content
MATLAB
Manufacturer
The MathWorks
A proprietary multi-paradigm programming language and numeric computing environment developed by MathWorks.
Overview
MATLAB is a high-level language and interactive environment that enables you to perform computationally intensive tasks faster than with traditional programming languages such as C, C++, and Fortran.
Getting Access
Access to software licensed by the University is based on University affiliation and sometimes the device on which the software is installed.
It is your responsibility to make sure you are using the software in accordance with the University's
Acceptable Use of Information Technology Resources
policy and
software terms and conditions
, plus any vendor terms listed below.
Faculty and Staff at UMN on OIT-Managed Devices
How to Get It
Self Service: Manage Software on University Mac Devices
or
Software Center: Manage Software on Your University Windows Device
Cost
Funded by a consortium of units. No charge for those eligible.
License Dates
January 1, 2025
-
December 31, 2025
License Details
Available only for UMN teaching, learning, or research.
Funded by a consortium of departments
through the College of Science and Engineering.
Allowed Uses
Research
Teaching and Learning
